calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-20-2026 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jul-21-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion For An Order Deeming The Truth Of The Matters Specified In Plaintiffs Request For Admissions As Admitted
Off Calendar Jan-28-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Prior to Open Court, Counsel for PLaintiff appears in abundance of caution. The Court did not receive any notice to contest from either side. There is no appearance by the Defendant.

Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.'s unopposed Motion for an Order Deeming the Truth of the Matters Specified in Plaintiff's Request For Admission as Admitted is GRANTED.

The record demonstrates Plaintiff properly served Requests for Admission and Defendant Christine N Crotzer did not provide any responses to Plaintiff's requests. (See Code of Civil Procedure section 2033.280.) Defendant's failure to timely respond is not excused. No meet and confer requirement when no responses have been provided.

Plaintiff's RFAs, Set One, served September 5, 2025, are deemed admitted.

Moving Party is ordered to prepare a proposed order which repeats the above text verbatim and email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org prior to the time set for hearing.

No proposed order received. Moving party failed to provide and follow the court's order.

Counsel for the moving party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
